description:
This quiz assesses core Rust memory management skills, including ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, and smart pointers, at a beginner-to-intermediate difficulty level. Delivered in an encouraging and supportive tone, it aims to reinforce foundational concepts for both new learners and experienced developers.
Topics: Memory management, Ownership, Borrowing rules, Lifetimes, Smart pointers
Audience: Beginner to intermediate Rust developers and learners
